title: Break any AI scam phone call in just a few easy steps [video]
abstract: Elevate your vigilance against deceptive AI scams with our tool, effortlessly disrupting fraudulent phone calls and protecting you from potential losses.
abstract_zh: 来来来，再也不怕骗子打骚扰电话了！我们的工具超简单就能识别那些装模作样的AI骗局，真的能帮你拦截掉不怀好意的电话，让你的钱包多点安全感，朋友，你还不赶紧试试？
